# Website Command Center v37 · GitHub Web UI Guide

1. Download the v37 overlay ZIP.
2. Unzip it.
3. Open `https://github.com/MontrealAI/goalos-agijobmanager-ascension`.
4. Click **Add file → Upload files**.
5. Drag the contents of the unzipped overlay into GitHub.
6. Commit directly to `main` with: `Add Website Command Center v37`.
7. Go to **Actions**.
8. Run **GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension Website Command Center Publisher v37**.
9. Keep `deploy_pages = true`, `commit_generated_source = true`, `run_live_factual_check = false`, and `strict_live_factual_check = false`.
10. Verify `/command-center.html`, `/site-navigation-v37.json`, `/production-url.json`, and the home page navigation.
